dialogues.text: I know what you're carrying. I can see it. Give me a few hours and I'll clear everything you owe.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. You won't feel it leave. That's the mercy in what I do.
dialogues.no_response: The offer stands. Time moves the same for both of us. For now.

dialogues.text: You have something most people don't — time you're not using the way you should. Let me take that weight.
dialogues.yes_response: Smart. The hours you lose were hours you were spending on the wrong things anyway.
dialogues.no_response: Come back when the debt feels heavier. It will.

dialogues.text: Debt is a slow erosion. I stop the erosion. I just need three hours. A small trade.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. You'll barely remember what you gave. That's always how it goes.
dialogues.no_response: Think on it. I'm in no hurry. You might be.

dialogues.text: I've taken hours from people who didn't know they were running out. You know. That makes this fair.
dialogues.yes_response: Fairer than most transactions. You at least understand what you're trading.
dialogues.no_response: Wisdom. Or stubbornness. Hard to tell them apart at a distance.

dialogues.text: You came to me today for a reason. Not the debt — you know why. Three hours. That's all.
dialogues.yes_response: There. That's what you came here for. Whether you knew it or not.
dialogues.no_response: You'll be back. The ones who say no always come back.

dialogues.text: The number in your balance — I can erase it. Three hours of yours. That's all I'm taking.
dialogues.yes_response: Done. You won't notice it gone until you reach the end of the day.
dialogues.no_response: Interesting. Most people in your position don't say no twice.

dialogues.text: I don't need your money. I have more than I'll ever spend. What I want is time. Yours specifically.
dialogues.yes_response: A generous trade. For one of us.
dialogues.no_response: You'll think about this later. In a quiet moment. You'll wonder.

dialogues.text: People always think they have more time than they do. You know better. That's interesting. Three hours.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. There's a clarity in knowing. Most people never get that.
dialogues.no_response: I respect that. It won't change things, but I respect it.

dialogues.text: I can feel you running short. It's something I notice. Three hours clears everything you owe.
dialogues.yes_response: Good decision. Everything balanced. Everything clean.
dialogues.no_response: Alright. The fog will come regardless. But I understand.

dialogues.text: This is the last time I'll ask. Three hours. Your debt disappears. Simple as that.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. I'll handle the rest. You won't feel where it went.
dialogues.no_response: Then go. Spend what you have on the people who matter. That's the wiser trade.
